title: Dwarka SUV Carjacking
description: A man was carjacked at gunpoint in Dwarka Sector 12 at 11 PM while parking his SUV. Two suspects approached on foot, one produced a pistol, forced victim out, and drove off. Vehicle recovered 3 days later abandoned in Gurugram with plates changed.
modus_operandi: Two-person foot approach, armed, late night parking area targeting, quick exit, plate swap after theft.

suspects.description: Male, 5'10", armed, wore dark hoodie and jeans
Male, 5'7", drove getaway, partial face on parking camera

evidence.description: Parking area camera captured approach and carjacking
SUV found in Gurugram with cloned plates from a scrapped vehicle
Fingerprints lifted from steering wheel of recovered vehicle

blind_spots: Cloned plate origin not traced for 5 days
Gurugram police not looped in until day 4
Similar carjacking MO in Noida from 2022 not cross-referenced
resolution: Fingerprint matched a suspect with prior carjacking record in UP. Arrested in Faridabad on day 13.
